01-locations/divumcaleo/ardvark-campus.h.title: Ardvark Campus
01-locations/divumcaleo/ardvark-campus.h.description:
A few buildings in the heart of Omnia City with several doors frames scattered around giving access to the interdimensional parts of the campus. While the space these building take up is rather small compared to the city, the total space within is comparable to the city itself.
The most prestigious magic school in the world. Almost every advancement in Divum-Caleo's magiteck comes from the work of students and graduates from this institution.TBD

01-locations/divumcaleo/arthaven.html.title: Arthaven
01-locations/divumcaleo/arthaven.html.description: A medium city on the east of Omnia. With several casinos

01-locations/divumcaleo/drapic.html.title: Drapic
01-locations/divumcaleo/drapic.html.description:
A large circular island with many large towers connected by walls along the edge of the island. These towers are built of various materials and emanate different magics raising barriers leaving quite the spectacle when sailing in from a airship. Within the walls is another story however. The barriers near invisible and the mostly gothic construction of buildings leave the place looking gray and shabby. After the corruption of Stefnu, God of Strategy most of the infrastructure was destroyed. Rebuilding efforts are going well with a focus to include flora.
Home of Stefnu, God of StrategyExports powerful defensive enchantments.

01-locations/divumcaleo/omnia.html.title: Omnia
01-locations/divumcaleo/omnia.html.description: The largest landmass centered in between the primeval islands. Most of civilization lives on this landmass. A forest of giant trees adorns the wilderness of this island.This continent is where many of the gods themselves call home.

01-locations/divumcaleo/omnia-city.html.title: Omnia City
01-locations/divumcaleo/omnia-city.html.description:
Well decorated and filled with life. The streets are filled with people walking around doing business. On the western coast of Omnia.
The largest city in Omnia
Home to Ardvark School of Magic and Invention
Constructs were invented here.

01-locations/divumcaleo/redwall.html.title: Redwall
01-locations/divumcaleo/redwall.html.description:
This city lays on the south of Sacred Mountains. Surrounded by red rock witch was used in the construction of their namesake wall guarding the government buildings.
Previous battle site of The Forgotten War and hosts a memorial to those who died during the holy wars.

01-locations/divumcaleo/sacred-isles.htm.title: Sacred Isles
01-locations/divumcaleo/sacred-isles.htm.description: Home of Pax, God of Peace

01-locations/divumcaleo/sacred-mountains.title: Sacred Mountains
01-locations/divumcaleo/sacred-mountains.description:
A mountain range spanning a large portion of the heart of Omnia.
In the center of this mountain range lies a crater home to a tree beyond scale. The Cycle's followers are know to inhabit this area.

01-locations/divumcaleo/wynding-wyvern-t.title: Wynding Wyvern Taverns
01-locations/divumcaleo/wynding-wyvern-t.description: A franchised tavern previously acting as the front for From Within Peace. The rooms are spacious but built for multiple people, leading them to be rather expensive for the solo adventurer.The shared 'basement' pocket dimension has been decommissioned and are no longer in use.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/anh.title: Anhedonia
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/anh.description: the inability to experience pleasure or joyThis location is comprised of grey cliffs that expand for what feels like forever. The closer you are to the conduit the flatter the land becomes.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/anx.title: Anxiety
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/anx.description:
a feeling of worry, nervousness, or unease, typically about an imminent event or something with an uncertain outcome.
An endless psychedelic jungle. It feels as if it is endlessly changing. In the center the jungle is a giant pillar balancing a large rock on top.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/cla.title: Clarity
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/cla.description: the quality of being coherent and intelligibleA freshly manicured lawn expands out as far as the eye can see with seemingly no end and no center.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/com.title: Comfort
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/com.description: a state of physical ease and freedom from pain or constraint.the temperature consistently feels like it has been warmed to perfection. The ground feels like velvet no matter what it looks like. the smallest conduit and the easiest to escape from as you can always find a door out.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/com.title: Compassion
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/com.description: sympathetic pity and concern for the sufferings or misfortunes of others.come back too

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/con.title: Confusion
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/con.description: lack of understanding; uncertainty.The area surrounding the conduit of confusion never seems to make sense. You can walk in one direction for hours following a stream only to suddenly find a mountain blocking your path with no sign of the stream ever having been present at all.AI Minecraft vibes

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/del.title: Delerium
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/del.description: the feeling of loosing presence and memorywhen you enter this location makes perfect structural sense. It almost feels relaxing, yet the longer you stay you feel discontent and the structures around you feel different, yet familiar.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/des.title: Despair
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/des.description: the complete loss or absence of hope.Despairing God, Mallik has been connected to this conduit since before his godhood. In fact this conduit is what sparked his potential to become a god.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.title: Disappointment
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.description: sadness or displeasure caused by the nonfulfillment of one's hopes or expectations.a land scattered with mirrors (leaving nothing up to interpretation here)

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.title: Disassociation
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.description: The feeling of not being presentEntering this conduit is not hard, the question is when will you be able to leave. The answer is you will never know and will never remember the time spent inside this conduit. No matter how you leave this conduit you will always find yourself inside the Clarity.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.title: Disillusion
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dis.description: disappointed in someone or something that one discovers to be less good than one had believed.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dou.title: Doubt
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/dou.description: a feeling of uncertainty or lack of conviction.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/env.title: Envy
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/env.description: a feeling of discontented or resentful longing aroused by someone else's possessions, qualities, or luck.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/exc.title: Excitement
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/exc.description: a feeling of great enthusiasm and eagerness

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/exh.title: Exhaustion
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/exh.description: Honestly I can't describe this one without the word exaustionThis conduit is a giant plains of tall grasses with scattered aluminum framed beds everywhere, each of them occupied by a humanoid creature capable of dreaming. The conduit of exhaustion is home to what many call sleep fairies. They are a crucial part of the local plains ecosystem; they bring in humanoid who are affected by the local magics of the conduit and fall into a deep slumber for the fairies to feed off of their dreams. As the fairies feed small bit of dreams leak out causing the natural fauna to spring to life from the ground. However some of these fairies are under the influence of the rotting portions of this conduit and have therefore been named bed rot fairies.trying to get out of this location using brute force will only lead to exhausting yourself until inevitably you can't resist falling asleep on on the the beds again. Using your mind you can escape, but it set you into a coma for 24 hours.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/fea.title: Fear
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/fea.description: the feeling something is a threat to safetey

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/for.title: Forlorn
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/for.description: pitifully sad and abandoned or lonely.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/gra.title: Gratefulness
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/gra.description: feeling or showing an appreciation of kindness; thankful.

01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/hum.title: Humiliation
01-locations/motis/emotional-conduit/hum.description: The feeling of sheer disappointment in ones self brought on by a noticed flaw.

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/primeval-gods.htm.title: Primeval Gods
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/primeval-gods.htm.description: The Primeval gods are less a pantheon and more a group of gods representative of the base materials the world is built upon. Existing before time itself little is know about these gods individual. Represents truth and law. Represents fertility and evil Represents ideals and chaos Represents life and good Two gods Yin, God of Death & Yang, God of Life Represents the soul, rebirth, and neutrality NO SIGIL

headers.heading: Primeval God of Water
Primeval God of Earth
Primeval God of Fire
Primeval God of Air
The Cycle

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-cycle.html.title: The Cycle
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-cycle.html.description: These gods swim in a bowl of souls tearing them apart and piecing them back together to birth new souls. Souls may go through this process several times before being sent to a body. Tears the souls thoroughly apart Reconstructs Souls

headers.heading: Yin, God of Death
Yang, God of Life

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-gemini-gods.h.title: The Gemini Gods
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-gemini-gods.h.description: The gods of strength and strategy, previously were constantly at war due to a misunderstanding in their previously mortal lives. Now they work in, mostly, harmony to protect the weak and helpless.SIGIL IN PROGRESS

headers.heading: Sahana, God of Strenght
Stefnu, God of Strategy

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-law-firm.html.title: The Law Firm
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-law-firm.html.description: Long ago the law firm was a single god, but from the people's belief that a single force of nature could decided what is right and what is wrong it split into three parts, now known individually as the Enforcer, Judge, and the Executioner. While they and their followers are dedicated to justice they understand that no single person can make a decision on the right or wrongs of a persons actions. Executioner Enforcer Judge

headers.heading: Gabrial, God of Repercussions
Gerald, God of Justice
Uriel, The Judge God

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-natural-order.title: The Natural Order
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-natural-order.description:
These god exist to preserve the balance between humanity and nature. Each god here was elevated from humanity by The Cycle to serve this purpose. Agriculture
Fungalia, God of Rot Shepherd of souls
Animal God, Animalia Animals SIGIL IN PROGRESS

headers.heading: Plant God, Plantae

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-orders-of-pea.title: The Orders of Peace
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-orders-of-pea.description:
These gods maintain peace across the world. Typically in conflict with The Three Ds because their nature dissolves peace. Head of the pantheon. Manifestation of the innate want for peace God of Tricks Demonstrates that malice is not necessary God of Knowledge Actively detests withholding information
Previous member of The Three Ds Proves redemption Teaches Lies SIGIL IN PROGRESS

headers.heading: Pax, God of Peace
Archie, Trickster God
Zar, God of Knowledge
Phyrix, God of White Lies

02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-three-ds.html.title: The Three Ds
02-npcs/gods/pantheons/the-three-ds.html.description: Baphomet, God of Destruction represents the fear of destruction and finds people to work along side him to make that happen. Recently their activity has increased. Mourning and regret have cause his powers to connect to the undead, providing a endless army. The embodiment of destruction. Her resentment has lead to desperation for power landing her clawing for power. SIGIL IN PROGRESS

headers.heading: Despairing God, Mallik
Baphomet, God of Destruction
Desperate God, Chitara

02-npcs/gods/animal-god,-animalia.html.title: Animal God, Animalia
02-npcs/gods/animal-god,-animalia.html.description:
TBDA noticeably larger stag, antlers draped in moss, and white eyes.The story goes that a young boy protested the trophy hunting his town relished in. One day he couldn't take it anymore so he ran into the wilderness alone, and over the coming years the game around the town seemed to no longer travel across common human foot paths. Less traps were triggered every week. One day when preparing for a hunt the town heard a rumbling greater than one of Baphomet, God of Destruction's rampages. Thousands of animals crossing the horizon with one goal. Leading the animals of the land the boy charged in.
During the battle the boy was gravely injured. Left bleeding on the battlefield he prayed to The Cycle to be forgiving. Little did he know, but they were already watching the whole fight go down. Eventually the light in the boys eyes faded. Days later a new sigil appeared in the sky signaling Animalia's appearance, and with it the news of a hunting town's demise spread.

02-npcs/gods/archie,-trickster-god.html.title: Archie, Trickster God
02-npcs/gods/archie,-trickster-god.html.description: TBDA white humanoid cat covered in poofy fur. Before ascending to god-hood under Pax, God of Peace she managed resources for From Within Peace. It was common that more illicit materials were mis-managed, be that given to Cosmos Pollenglow or used in combination with the control emotions spell to enter a comatosed state temporarily.Now-a-days Archie

02-npcs/gods/pax,-god-of-peace.html.title: Pax, God of Peace
02-npcs/gods/pax,-god-of-peace.html.description: TBDA tall elf with long hair and flowing blonde hair. After recovering from her corruption she maintained patches of stone-like skin with dark cracks on her forehead that spread to cover her eyes which she is now unable to open.Any who her her voice find themselves soothed.To be written (pester granite for info)

02-npcs/gods/phyrix,-god-of-white-lies.h.title: Phyrix, God of White Lies
02-npcs/gods/phyrix,-god-of-white-lies.h.description: Previously God of Deceit, now the god of white lieswhite shadowy creature, human sized

02-npcs/gods/primeval-god-of-air.html.title: Primeval God of Air
02-npcs/gods/primeval-god-of-air.html.description: TBDA large hollow statuette with a hollow face. Stone masks with various faces are littered around it. If agitated these masks will whirl around the statuette waking the god. Considered the representation of good. Inhabits the Island of Air in the west.

02-npcs/gods/serenitous,-luck-god.html.title: Serenitous, Luck God
02-npcs/gods/serenitous,-luck-god.html.description:
Weeld
Ongeluk
Pilie

02-npcs/gods/zar,-god-of-knowledge.html.title: Zar, God of Knowledge
02-npcs/gods/zar,-god-of-knowledge.html.description:
Previously a leader of from within peace, now the god of Knowledge
ascended god

02-npcs/lily.html.title: Lily
02-npcs/lily.html.description:
#character Gnome
Student of Ardvark Campus that needed help with here enchantment final

02-npcs/ongeluk.html.title: Ongeluk
02-npcs/ongeluk.html.description: #character

03-organizations/ardvark-school-of-magic.title: Ardvark School of Magic and Invention
03-organizations/ardvark-school-of-magic.description: Note from dm: this place was a off handed joke in a session once, became real, then chosen not to explore. A large campus in the heart of Omnia City, and the most prestigious school in the world. Hosting mostly magic, and innovation classes has them leading the charge for innovation in Magiteck.
03-organizations/ardvark-school-of-magic.sourcePath: 03 Organizations/Ardvark School of Magic and Invention.md

03-organizations/from-within-peace.html.title: From Within Peace
03-organizations/from-within-peace.html.description:
An organization that was focused on discovering how to revert the Corruption of the gods.
A now defunct organization ran by the now gods Desperate God, Chitara, Zar, God of Knowledge, and Archie, Trickster God. Little is known about how they conducted their work, but the results are well celebrated.

03-organizations/the-fey-courts.html.title: The Fey Courts
03-organizations/the-fey-courts.html.description: Interacting with the fey courts will be the main political aspect of Into the Wilds.There are 5 Courts in the feywilds each representing a different primeval concept: earth, air, water, fire, and soul. Each court is divided into two opposing groups. These courts often operate outside of Emotional Conduits but aim to control those that benefit them. Digging Roots Spreading branches Sweet Breeze Sour Gas Frozen Truths Boiling Change Copper Flames Lithium Flames Minds Desire Settling Souls

headers.heading: The Court of Wood: Earth
The Court of Scents: Air
The Court of Waves: Water
The Court of Oxidization: Fire
The Court of Consciousness: Soul

03-organizations/wynding-wyvern.html.title: Wynding Wyvern
03-organizations/wynding-wyvern.html.description:
Acted as the base of operations for From Within Peace and the party of Beyond the Gods. Known mostly for funding Cosmos Pollenglow and Alaston Wren while they cured the gods of corruptions
A franchised tavern previously acting as the front for From Within Peace. The rooms are spacious but built for multiple people, leading them to be rather expensive for the solo adventurer.

05-events/the-forgotten-war.html.title: The Forgotten War
05-events/the-forgotten-war.html.description:
Alaston Wren
The Three Ds
Pax, God of Peacea turning point in history denoting a new year 0

05-events/the-purity.html.title: The Purity
05-events/the-purity.html.description: This time started with the removal of Jannek Deslo and the undoing of all the Gods Corruption. allowing the world to find balance once again.

06-world-info/homebrew/backgrounds/soull.title: Soulless
06-world-info/homebrew/backgrounds/soull.description: As a result of Jannek Deslo stealing the gem of souls, Yin, God of Death and Yang, God of Life were unable to distribute souls for a few years. As such this "race" is only born in the years 492-494, meaning that they are around 18-20 years old. All the people born during this time lack souls severing their connection to the gods.Due to the lack of a soul these people typically lack motivation. Whatever they do is just a means to survive. Along with this their lack of a soul also makes them nearly undetectable by the gods, leaving their prayers unanswered. This has lead some Soulless to become religious spies.Skill Proficiencies: Perception, Insight Tool Proficiencies: Artisan tool of choice Languages: One of your choice Equipment: Artisan tool of choice, a winter blanket, a set of common clothes, and 10gpDue to the lack of a soul you are unable to be directly punished, rewarded, or non-physically perceived by the gods. The only divine punishment or reward you can get is one granted by someone of the god's faith.

06-world-info/homebrew/classes/subclass..title: Subclass. Fey Soul
06-world-info/homebrew/classes/subclass..description: Due to the fey magic that has been infused into your blood you find yourself able to read and speak sylvan.Starting at 1st level, you learn additional spells when you reach certain levels in this class, as shown on the Fey Spells table. Each of these spells counts as a sorcerer spell for you, but it doesn't count against the number of sorcerer spells you knowStarting at 1rst level, you can use your action to stare down a creature within 60 feet. That creature must make a wisdom saving through against your spell save DC. If it fails it must use it's next turn to attack the nearest creature to it. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.Starting at 6th level, whenever you cast an leveled enchantment or illusion spell you may increase the area the spell effects by 10 feet. You may only use this ability a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus until you take a long rest.Starting at 14th level, you can see the natural fey pathways that connect to this world. Looking at a location up to 45 feet away you can find and use a pathway to get there. Using a bonus action you can open a gateway to this path and hop in. You may also designate an ally size medium or smaller within 5 feet of you to use their reaction to hop in after you. After a creature hops through the gateway they are transported to the end of the path, or within 5 feet of the exit.Starting at 18th, level the first time a creatures makes a save to end an effect that you placed upon them with an illusion or enchantment spell they automatically fail.

06-world-info/homebrew/classes/subclass..title: Subclass. Rotting Fey Soul
06-world-info/homebrew/classes/subclass..description: Due to the rotting fey magic that has been infused into your blood you find yourself able to speak deep speech.Starting at 1st level, you learn additional spells when you reach certain levels in this class, as shown on the Fey Spells table. Each of these spells counts as a sorcerer spell for you, but it doesn't count against the number of sorcerer spells you knowStarting at 1rst level, you can use your action to stare down a creature within 60 feet. That creature must make a wisdom saving through against your spell save DC. If it fails it takes 1d6 necrotic damage and has disadvantage on attack rolls until your next turn.You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.Starting at 6th level, whenever you cast an leveled enchantment or illusion spell you may increase the area the spell effects by 10 feet. You may only use this ability a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus until you take a long rest.Starting at 14th level, you can see the natural fey pathways that connect to this world. Using a action you can choose a medium or smaller creature within 45 feet of you and a unoccupied point within 45 feet of you. The targeted creature falls through a portal and appears again at the target location. After traveling the path they were afflicted with the rot of the fey wilds. They take 2d6 necrotic damage and 1d12 psychic damage.You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.Starting at 18th, whenever you cast raise dead you may target an additional zombie, skeleton, or corpse. Additionally whenever you cast Dance Macabre you may target 2 additional corpses while casting the spell.

06-world-info/homebrew/items/raw-magic-v.title: Raw Magic Vials
06-world-info/homebrew/items/raw-magic-v.description: Raw magic vials are used for a variety of uses in the world of Divumcaleo. They are power sources, data storage devices, and conduits of magic. There sheer versatility makes them high in demand. While supply isn't to far behind it's still makes them rather expensive especially if they are programmed to do specific things. The prices range from just about 250 GP for a blank vial and upwards of 10000 gp for a preprogrammed vial or series of viles for a specific task.The magic-tech that you have seen has some level of portability. Being trapped in a vial allows you to access a limited form of the screens and data tracking capabilities that the laboratory has shown you. They are also used within the technology of the sky tram to simplify the user interface allowing a greater selection of places to transport yourself to.A blank vial can be use by even the most inexperienced users to track pages of information easily. Each vial can store approximately 250 pages of data. When using it as a spell book with depictions, or images of somatic components it stores around 100 pages of data.to make a vial accessible you would either need a separate vial to use as a boot vial these vials can cost around 325 GP and must sacrifice 50% of their usable space to be be a boot vial.

06-world-info/homebrew/items/sky-tram.ht.title: sky tram
06-world-info/homebrew/items/sky-tram.ht.description:
invented by Jannek DesloThese giant contraptions speed up travel in the world. Allowing people to move halfway across the world in just under 10 minutes. These machines are unfortunately incapible of transporting items with extra planar connections such as the bag of holding as compressing the opening to the pocet dimension is dangerous. Raw magic vials due to their nature are not compressible which is required for sky tram transportation. Attempting to bring a raw magic vial onto a sky tram will cause the flask to break and the magic to explode.
This machine is powered by Raw Magic Vials

06-world-info/homebrew/races/seraphim.ht.title: Seraphim
06-world-info/homebrew/races/seraphim.ht.description: When a person finds themself blessed by a god their form shifts to match that god. This can give a multitude of benefits, but also many visual abnormalities.People of this origin are usually either high clerics of a god themselves or descendants of seraphim. However these traits are not likely being passed down and usually die out in only a couple generations. When a god falls their seraphim loose their powers and stop passing on their blessing.Age. You reach maturity at whatever age your original race was, however your lifespan has been increased to a millennium.Size. Your size depends on your race of birth.Speed Your base walking speed is 30 feetAbility Score IncreaseYou gain the ability to cast spells associated with your god. You know the a cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast a first level spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. When you reach 5th level, you can cast a second level spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Choose intelligence, wisdom, or charisma for the spellcasting ability of these spells.“One requires a blessing from a god to be as opulent as myself”~Weeld Of Serenitous

06-world-info/corruption.html.title: Corruption
06-world-info/corruption.html.description:
#corrupted Corruption is a manipulation of a god that can have multiple causes. This typically causes the god to become violent in the process while also loosing contact with their followers. A corrupted god does not require nearly as many followers to fuel there divinity as a regular god.
In the case of Pax, God of Peace she also took control of her Arch Clerics.
Stefnu, God of Strategy became a kaiju level threat almost flattening the following of Sahana, God of Strenght in the process.

06-world-info/divum-caleo.html.title: Divum-Caleo
06-world-info/divum-caleo.html.description: More in dept information on the world will be put here in the future.

06-world-info/divum-motis.html.title: Divum-Motis
06-world-info/divum-motis.html.description: More in dept information on the motis will be placed here.

06-world-info/emotional-conduits.html.title: Emotional Conduits
06-world-info/emotional-conduits.html.description: Emotional conduits are locations centered on a well of pure emotion in the same way that the primeval islands are for elemental magic. Similarly these locations are required to be in good health for the stability of the feywilds ecosystem. There unfortunately isn't much knowledge of the inner workings of these locations.When you pass the threshold into the borders of a emotional conduit it feels as though that border expands limitless distances around you. Once you've entered into the domain of a conduit it becomes much harder to get out, as emotional conduits feel much larger from the inside then on the outside.

06-world-info/gods.html.title: Gods
06-world-info/gods.html.description:
More in dept information on how the gods of this world work will be put here when I get the time. The rest of the document also needs to be linked and updated (I think everything good but I need to do a 3rd go over.)Fire Representation of Chaos, South Air Representation of Good, West Water Representation of Law, North Earth Representation of Evil, EastThe Law Firm Gerald God of Justice (Human) (LG) Uriel God of Judgment (Angelic) (LN) Gabrial God of Repercussions (fiendish) (LE)
The Natural Order Plantae God of Plants (Giant Oak Tree) (LN) Fungalia God of Rot (CN) Animalia God of Animals (Male Deer) (CG)
The Cycle Yang God of Life (Fish, yin) (TN) Yin God of Death (Fish, yang) (TN)
The Three Ds Baphomet God of Destruction (Archfiend) (NE) Mallik God of Despair (Satyr)
Desperate God, Chitara (Human)

06-world-info/magiteck.html.title: Magiteck
06-world-info/magiteck.html.description: More in dept information on the technology of this world will be put here.

06-world-info/the-divine-guide.html.title: The Divine Guide
06-world-info/the-divine-guide.html.description:
A world divided into two hemispheres with one side being the relatively unexplored elemental planes, the other being hundreds of islands floating on a bed of dense clouds known as the void. The first inhabitants of this world where the Primeval Gods who made used their power to construct this world and it's surroundings as they saw fit. Eventually life sprouted from their creations, and so to the will of man spouted gods.
The name 'Divum-Caleo' roughly translates to divine sky. The two main components of the world; The 'gods' and the 'sky'. The sky is filled with vibrant color and sigils representing each god. Along with the sigils of the gods 4 visible Celestial bodies float in the sky. The sun, and three moons. The three moons represent the gods of air, earth, and water: large sharp tan fragments held close together by visible streams of air, a large brown sphere with ever changing fractures, and a large ball of pale blue ice reflecting the most light out of any of the moons.This world also doesn't work on the Gregorian calendar but instead one I devised myself. (PENDING LINK HERE)
The gods of this world are formed by the hopes and desires of it's people. Gods form from a shared desire among people, the worship of a person, or by an existing gods choice. Besides the permanence of the primeval gods other gods must be worshiped to maintain their power and influence. If you wish to learn more about gods check out the Gods page and check out individual gods that pique your interest as well.
The Motis is this worlds version of the feywilds, hosting the five fey courts of this world and the Emotional Conduits. Each court functions dramatically differently and none entirely alike the politics of the material plane. That with the emotional conduits influencing emotions make the inhabitants of the wilds incredibly volatile and diverse. The emotional conduits influence and manipulate the emotions of any creature within their range, often dramatically, however those who live in the wilds most of their lives build a natural tolerance to their affects.Magic is used everywhere in this world and with some recent inventions they are undergoing a technical revolution. With consistent communication magic in most peoples hands now days, and quick transportation between large cities has allowed the world to advance further at rapid rates.
Magic has also become 'programmable' with the invention of Raw Magic Vials using them as fuel for large contraptions.

info_defaultMediaIcon.description: The icon to use for media files. Prefix with 'lucide//' to use a Lucide icon

info_showOrphanNodes.description: Show nodes that are not connected to any other nodes.

info_showAttachments.description: Show attachments like images and PDFs as nodes in the graph.

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: Allow the user to view the global graph of all nodes.

info_allowExpand.description: Allow the user to pop-out the graph view to take up the whole screen

info_attractionForce.description: How much should linked nodes attract each other? This will make the graph appear more clustered.

info_linkLength.description: How long should the links between nodes be? The shorter the links the more connected nodes will cluster together.

info_repulsionForce.description: How much should nodes repel each other? This will make disconnected parts more spread out.

info_centralForce.description: How much should nodes be attracted to the center? This will make the graph appear more dense and circular.

info_edgePruning.description: Edges with a length above this threshold will not be rendered, however they will still contribute to the simulation. This can help large tangled graphs look more organised. Hovering over a node will still display these links.

info_minNodeRadius.description: How small should the smallest nodes be? The smaller a node is the less it will attract other nodes.

info_maxNodeRadius.description: How large should the largest nodes be? Nodes are sized by how many links they have. The larger a node is the more it will attract other nodes. This can be used to create a good grouping around the most important nodes.

info_allowResizing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be resized

info_allowCollapsing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be collapsed

info_rightDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the right sidebar

info_leftDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the left sidebar

info_selector.description: CSS selector for an element. The feature will be placed relative to this element.

info_type.description: Will this feature be placed before, after, or inside (at the beggining or end).

info_featurePlacement.description: Where to place this feature on the page. (Relative to the selector)

info_sourcePath.description: The local path to the source .html file which will be included.

info_allowFoldingLists.description: Whether or not to allow lists to be folded

info_allowFoldingHeadings.description: Whether or not to allow headings to be folded

info_siteUrl.description: The url that this site will be hosted at

info_authorName.description: The name of the author of the site
